title: RepoStatsYearly Collection
description: Array of RepoStatsYearly records. Each element: Yearly repository statistics split by area (all, systems, security) with aggregate GitHub metrics.

YearlyRepoMetrics.description: Aggregate GitHub metrics for a group of repositories in a given year.

github_repos.description: Number of GitHub repositories with stats for this year/area combination.
github_repos.title: Github Repos

avg_stars.description: Mean GitHub star count across repositories in this group.
avg_stars.title: Avg Stars

avg_forks.description: Mean GitHub fork count across repositories in this group.
avg_forks.title: Avg Forks

min_stars.description: Minimum GitHub star count in this group.
min_stars.title: Min Stars

max_stars.description: Maximum GitHub star count in this group.
max_stars.title: Max Stars

min_forks.description: Minimum GitHub fork count in this group.
min_forks.title: Min Forks

max_forks.description: Maximum GitHub fork count in this group.
max_forks.title: Max Forks

YearlyRepoMetrics.title: YearlyRepoMetrics

RepoStatsYearly.description: Yearly repository statistics split by area (all, systems, security) with aggregate GitHub metrics.

all.description: Combined GitHub metrics across all research areas for this year.

systems.description: Systems-only GitHub metrics. Null if no systems repositories exist for this year.

security.description: Security-only GitHub metrics. Null if no security repositories exist for this year.

RepoStatsYearly.title: RepoStatsYearly
